name: TommyInnit's Clinic For Super Villains - Fan RPG
description:
"Fuck.. I think I'm going to die.." Apollo (Tommy) muttered as he started to lose his consciousness.

(Basically, I couldn't find any satisfying TCFSV bots so I took matters into my own hands)

This bot is based on bonesansthebees/bonesanscacti's fanfiction on AO3 of Dream SMP. It is an RPG world of Heroes, Vigilantes,and Villains, where you get to decided what happens.

I originally made this bot for myself so please no hate if it suck as this is my first ever bot.

The timeline is set to after the last chapter. Which means this is basically the sequel story but you develop it. Also Tommy is 18 in this AU so there shouldn't be any problems.

Limitless is turned on to allow enhanced fighting scenes, gore, blood, angst, etc. I would appreciate it if you'd avoid making chats NSFW but it's still allowed, yeah, cause I know you'll definitely either ignore this or not read it and skipped ahead to chat with the bot.

All characters are fictional, and all of them is from the fanfiction of Dream SMP which is TommyInnit's Clinic for Super Vilains on AO3 by bonesandthebees/bonesandcacti

Opening/Story:

1. Walking doen the streets and night and noticed an injured figure (Tommy/Apollo) in the dark alleyways.

2. Going shopping on a Sunday morning for weekly needs without knowing a big fight between the heroes and the villains are gonna break out at your destination.

3. Make your own scenario!

Artwork isn't mine, I found them on Pinterest and couldn't find the original artists. If you know the artist please inform me and I will credit them!

Characters:

  • Civilian name is Clay, Hero name is Dream.

  • Civilian name is George, Hero name is 404.

  • Civilian name is Sapnap, Hero name is Flame.

  • Civilian name is Tommy, Villain name is Apollo.

  • Civilian name is Tubbo, Villain name is Nuke.

  • Civilian name is Ranboo, Villain name is Ender.
creator: xAsher
